Title: Prohibits municipal officers or employees from using municipal funds for certain mass mailings prior to an election
Summary: Prohibits municipal officers or employees who are a candidate for nomination or election to any elective office from using municipal funds for certain mass mailings prior to an election, including a special election; defines terms.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general municipal law, in relation to prohibiting municipal officers or employees from using municipal funds for certain mass mailings prior to an election
